creator: brad@facefault.org
text:
Created attachment 175247
/boot/loader.conf

The rtwn driver in FreeBSD 11.0RC3 doesn't successfully load the firmware during boot; it errors with "timeout waiting for checksum report" (sys/dev/rtwn/if_rtwn.c line 2193). It does successfully bring up the wlan interface and authenticate to a network if I manually unload and reload the rtwn module.
